info.name: ResourceFlow — Full API Tests (current, destructive)
info.description: Полный ручной/runner API-прогон текущего ResourceFlow. Коллекция создаёт и изменяет тестовые данные. Перед запуском примените миграции, выполните `make demo-reset`, запустите backend, выберите окружение и заполните `adminPassword`. Значение `appTimezone` должно совпадать с backend `APP_TIMEZONE` (по умолчанию UTC). После прогона снова выполните `make demo-reset`.

exec: const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US", {timeZone, year:"numeric", month:"2-digit", day:"2-digit", hour:"2-digit", minute:"2-digit", second:"2-digit", hourCycle:"h23"}).formatToParts(date);
const asUTC = Date.UTC(Number(p.year), Number(p.month)-1, Number(p.day), Number(p.hour), Number(p.minute), Number(p.second));
let result = new Date(guessMs - zoneOffsetMs(new Date(guessMs), tz));

item.name: Create Booking at Current Minute — allowed
Create Booking One Minute Earlier — rejected

exec: pm.test("intervals have valid ranges", () => json.data.forEach(i => { const start = Date.parse(i.start_at); const end = Date.parse(i.end_at); pm.expect(Number.isNaN(start)).to.eql(false); pm.expect(Number.isNaN(end)).to.eql(false); pm.expect(end).to.be.above(start); }));

item.name: Busy Range — booking crosses range start
Busy Range — booking crosses range end
Create Existing Booking for Batch Conflict
Batch Create — atomic rollback on conflict

exec: pm.test("no failed batch records", () => pm.expect(json.data.filter(b => b.purpose === `ATOMIC_BATCH_FAIL_${pm.environment.get("runId")}`).length).to.eql(0));
pm.test("all pending by rule", () => pm.expect(json.data.items.every(i => i.status === "pending")).to.eql(true));
pm.test("three batch records exist", () => pm.expect(json.data.filter(b => b.purpose === `VALID_BATCH_${pm.environment.get("runId")}`).length).to.eql(3));
